label: sandbox_diagnostics • bare `npm install` redirects to sandbox_install
notes: A model ran `npm install express` directly in the agent home instead of sandbox_install (manager:"npm"). Bare npm in the home is exactly what produced the `Tracker idealTree already exists` failures (here exit 1). The self-heal hint must fire and point at sandbox_install so the isolated node workspace + recovery harness applies.

sandboxDiagnostics.stderr:
npm error code EACCES
npm error syscall mkdir
npm error path /home/agent/node_modules
